description: NTE live first-20 preflight check 4 (live_mode_flags_intentional). All five must be true for PASS.

pass_condition.NTE_PAPER_MODE: must NOT be truthy (unset, false, 0, empty)
pass_condition.FIRST_TWENTY_ALLOW_LIVE: must be exactly truthy: 1, true, yes (see code — uses strip.lower in ('1','true','yes'))

critical_note: FIRST_TWENTY_ALLOW_LIVE uses a stricter check than other vars: only 1/true/yes after strip; other 'truthy' strings may fail.

FAIL_nte_not_live.effect: Check 4 FAIL — must be exactly live

ACCIDENTAL_safe_nte_paper_or_missing_liv.description: Any combination where COINBASE_ENABLED is false, NTE_EXECUTION_MODE is not live, or NTE_PAPER_MODE is true leaves you in paper/safe territory — preflight should FAIL check 4

AMBIGUOUS.effect: Compared lowercase — LIVE uppercase may fail; use live
Should pass if strip works — prefer exact true/1/yes without odd whitespace
